_comment_1: Ground-truth parser totals for the parity test in tests/test_deeps_parity.py.
_comment_2: Generated by Deeps/rust/parity-dump/ (Rust source of truth, release build) against the log identified by 'log_filename' below.
_comment_3: If kazbars.deeps_parsers ever drifts from the Rust source, the parity test fails until either the parsers are fixed or these totals are regenerated.
_comment_4: To regenerate: cargo build --release -p parity-dump (in Deeps/rust/), then run parity-dump.exe <path/to/log> and copy the numbers below.
_comment_5: EXCEPTION: pet_damage is own-pet-only (lines prefixed 'Your'), intentionally diverging from the Rust source which counted ALL known pets (810 / 50086). KazBars credits only the logger's own pet — see parse_pet_hit. The other four categories remain byte-for-byte Rust-parity.
